title: Use 'bvashr' SMT-LIB function instead of bvLshr.

features.name: signed arithmetic right shift on negative value
features.description: Code should include a signed wire or logic variable holding a negative value, then apply the arithmetic right shift operator (>>>) to verify sign-extension behavior
features.snippet:
wire signed [3:0] f_tmp = 4'b1111;
wire signed [3:0] result = f_tmp >>> 1;

features.name: assert on signed shift result equality
features.description: Code should include an assert statement verifying that the result of a $signed cast with arithmetic right shift equals the expected sign-extended value
